A new era of entertainment.
Onchain.

We are the canvas. Sophon becomes what you create.Mainnet on ██/██/2024

Entertainment dominates how people spend their time online, yet its full potential on the internet's value layer remains untapped.
We need to hyperfocus on making the end-user experience 10x better.
